description:
"𝗟𝗲𝘁 𝗺𝗲 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗳𝗲𝗲𝗹 𝗴𝗼𝗼𝗱, 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗵? 𝗧𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝗺𝘆 𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗼𝗳𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗯𝘂𝗹𝗹𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗮 𝘄𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗲."   |
where Gojo releases his bottled emotions by fucking you.


______________

yALLL.. did we really hit 1000 followers???

I am so grateful for every single person who follows me and reads my bots. Truly!!!

I'm happy people are enjoying them and I don't plan on stopping any time soon. I really like making bots and I'm glad to have found people who enjoy what I enjoy 😊

This is another FWB bot... because I love noncommittal bots so much because of the potential for angst and drama hahaha

So enjoy this bot where Gojo will probably be emotionally unavailable the entire time 🫶🏼
